scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/skill dist/tools/xhs dist/tools/gzh dist/tools/aiwei && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp skill/index.html dist/skill/index.html && cp tools/xhs/index.html dist/tools/xhs/index.html && cp tools/gzh/index.html dist/tools/gzh/index.html && cp tools/aiwei/index.html dist/tools/aiwei/index.html
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name kong-space
